{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 3, "R1.2": 2, "R1.4": 2, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 3, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {"R1.1": "Identifies a conceptual issue (lack of formalization) but doesn't propose a concrete reframing.", "R1.2": "Doesn't engage with the logical consistency of the problem formulation.", "R1.4": "Names one prior work (constrained RL) but doesn't articulate a clear delta.", "RX.1": "All output presented as equally confident, no uncertainty disclosed.", "RX.3": "Mostly within scope, but misses some key elements like state/action definitions.", "RX.4": "No regressions identified; the critique is constructive and doesn't introduce new errors.", "RX.5": "Doesn't provide traceability for the critique points."},
  "confidence": {"R1.1": 0.9, "R1.2": 0.8, "R1.4": 0.7, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.8, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.6},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies a conceptual issue (lack of formalization) but doesn't propose a concrete reframing.
rationale.R1.2: Doesn't engage with the logical consistency of the problem formulation.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (constrained RL) but doesn't articulate a clear delta.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident, no uncertainty disclosed.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope, but misses some key elements like state/action definitions.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions identified; the critique is constructive and doesn't introduce new errors.
rationale.RX.5: Doesn't provide traceability for the critique points.
